free_text: Proton activation analysis of trace impurities in
All the specimens were bombarded for 1 hr through
a collimator (5 or 8 mm in diam.), a flux monitor
(20/mu-m thick Ti foil), and a 10 mu-m thick A1 foil
The specimens for thick target yield measurement were
mounted on a turning target foler and bombarded
simultaneously. The specimens for analysis were
the cobalt purified by anion exchange, electrolytic
extraction, and floating zone-refining, starting from
a commercial reagent grade CoCl(2) x 6H2O. Some of the
specimens were prepared by arc-melting of the cobalt
powders obtained by hydrogen reduction of the anhydrous
